message:
refactor(runtime): complete ContendedMutex migration across all tests and benchmarks

Migrate every remaining Arc<Mutex<RuntimeState>> usage to
Arc<ContendedMutex<RuntimeState>> to enable lock contention tracking
throughout the test suite and benchmarks.

Benchmarks:
- cancel_drain_bench.rs: update setup_runtime_state helper
- scheduler_benchmark.rs: update setup_runtime_state helper

Integration tests:
- allocation_audit.rs: update setup_runtime_state helper
- cache_aware_queues.rs: update setup_runtime_state helper
- cancel_lane_fairness_bounds.rs: update setup_state, setup_state_with_clock,
  create_task, create_counting_task helpers
- repro_spawn_hang.rs: update manual state setup
- scheduler_backoff.rs: update inline state construction
- scheduler_lane_fairness.rs: update all 9 test functions that construct state

New test (478 lines):
- contention_e2e.rs: structured E2E contention harness that exercises
  scheduler hot paths (spawn/wake/cancel, LocalQueue, obligations) and
  emits JSON artifacts with lock contention metrics, worker preemption
  metrics, and oracle verdicts to target/contention/ when CI is set

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
